lookup_youtube_stats.name: lookup_youtube_stats
lookup_youtube_stats.description: Lookup subscriber counts, views, and growth from a YouTube channel by handle or name

find_crypto_price.name: find_crypto_price
find_crypto_price.description: Find the current price of a specified cryptocurrency on CoinMarketCap.

lookup_wikipedia_entity.name: lookup_wikipedia_entity
lookup_wikipedia_entity.description: Searches Wikipedia for a given entity (person, concept, product, etc.) and returns the search results and page information.

search_product_info.name: search_product_info
search_product_info.description: Performs a general search on Google for a specified product or item and extracts structured information from the search results.

whatsapp_tool.name: whatsapp_tool
whatsapp_tool.description: Interact with WhatsApp to check connection status, list chats, or generate summaries of group or direct chats. Actions: 'status' (checks connection/QR code state), 'chats' (lists recent chats), 'summarize' (summarizes the chat matching 'chat_name' or 'chat_id').
